tasks.name: Create CourseProgressChart component skeleton with Card wrapper
tasks.purpose: Create the base client component structure with Card wrapper, CardHeader, and CardContent but without chart implementation

constraints: Must be a client component with 'use client' directive
Must accept props: completionPercentage, completedLessons, totalLessons
Must handle null/undefined props gracefully

tasks.output_state: CourseProgressChart component exists with Card wrapper, renders CardHeader with 'Course Progress' title, CardContent is empty placeholder
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists, renders Card with header 'Course Progress', accepts props interface, pnpm typecheck passes
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/course-progress-chart.tsx && grep -q "'use client'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/course-progress-chart.tsx && grep -q 'CardHeader' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/course-progress-chart.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add PieChart donut with ChartContainer wrapper
tasks.purpose: Implement the Recharts PieChart with innerRadius for donut shape, wrapped in ChartContainer with ChartConfig for theme-aware colors

dependencies: PieChart, Pie, Cell, ResponsiveContainer from recharts
constraints: Use innerRadius=60, outerRadius=80 for donut shape
Use startAngle=90, endAngle=-270 for clockwise from top
Transform completionPercentage to two-segment data array: completed and remaining
Use ChartConfig with 'chart-1' for completed, 'muted' for remaining
Wrap in ResponsiveContainer with width='100%' height={200}

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressChart component exists with Card wrapper but empty CardContent
tasks.output_state: PieChart renders inside CardContent with donut shape showing completion percentage, uses theme-aware colors from ChartContainer
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PieChart renders with innerRadius creating donut, two Cell colors for completed/remaining segments, ChartContainer provides theme support, pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.name: Add center label with percentage text
tasks.purpose: Display the completion percentage as large bold text in the center of the donut chart with 'X of Y lessons' subtitle

dependencies: SVG text element for center label
constraints: Use absolute positioning overlay div for center content (not SVG text)
Primary text: percentage with large bold font (text-2xl font-bold)
Secondary text: 'X of Y lessons' with smaller muted color (text-sm text-muted-foreground)
Center both horizontally and vertically using flex layout

tasks.input_state: PieChart donut renders but no center label
tasks.output_state: Donut chart displays completion percentage in center with bold large text and 'X of Y lessons' subtitle below
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Center label shows percentage (e.g., '72%') with large bold styling, subtitle shows lesson count (e.g., '18 of 25 lessons'), text is centered over donut, pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.name: Add graceful fallback for null data
tasks.purpose: Handle null/undefined course_progress data by displaying 0% ring with appropriate empty state messaging

constraints: Check for null/undefined props at component entry
Display 0% ring when data is missing (not hide chart entirely)
Show '0 of 0 lessons' in subtitle
Maintain same visual structure as populated state

tasks.input_state: Component assumes valid data props, may crash or render incorrectly with null
tasks.output_state: Component handles null/undefined gracefully by showing 0% ring with appropriate empty state text
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders when props are null/undefined, shows 0% ring with gray fill, displays '0 of 0 lessons', no errors in console, pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.name: Wire CourseProgressChart to dashboard grid
tasks.purpose: Import and integrate CourseProgressChart into the dashboard page grid at Row 1, Column 1 position with data from loader

dependencies: Dashboard page grid layout from I1.F1
constraints: Import CourseProgressChart into page.tsx
Place in Row 1, Column 1 of grid
Pass course_progress data from loader as props
Extract completionPercentage, completedLessons, totalLessons from loader data

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressChart component exists but not used in dashboard page, page has grid layout from I1.F1
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressChart renders in dashboard grid at top-left position with live data from loader
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CourseProgressChart imported in page.tsx, placed in grid position Row 1 Col 1, receives data from loader props, chart renders on /home page, pnpm typecheck passes

tasks.name: Verify rendering and dark mode support
tasks.purpose: Validate chart renders correctly, dark mode works via CSS variables, and all quality checks pass

constraints: Test in light mode and dark mode
Verify chart colors change with theme
Run pnpm typecheck
Run pnpm lint
Visual verification with agent-browser

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressChart wired to dashboard but not validated
tasks.output_state: Chart verified to render correctly, dark mode works, all quality checks pass
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Chart visible at /home in Row 1 Col 1, colors adapt to light/dark mode, pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm lint passes, no console errors
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && agent-browser open http://localhost:3000/home && agent-browser wait 3000 && agent-browser 'is visible' 'Course Progress' && agent-browser 'is visible' '%'
